Download all topics and parts from the provided course JSON content by delegating to wanmen_download_by_course_topic_part for each topic-part pair.

Arguments:
    json_api_content (list): The JSON structure containing the course data; the function uses json_api_content[0]['Topics'] to enumerate topics and their 'Parts'. Required (no default).

    output_dir (str): Directory where downloaded content will be saved. Defaults to '.' (current directory). Optional.

    merge (bool): Whether to merge downloaded content with existing files. Defaults to True. Optional.

    info_only (bool): If True, do not download, only report information. Defaults to False. Optional.

    kwargs (dict): Additional keyword arguments forwarded to wanmen_download_by_course_topic_part. Optional.

Returns:
    None: the function does not return a value.
